title: Gas report - Week 41
summary:
LNG
With few actual fixtures reported this week, the LNG market has seen further corrections down. At the same time last year we had been publishing at $405,290 for BLNG1g a value $275,782 higher than that with which we published today. For Aus-Japan a fall of $34,100 on the week gave the index a value of $129,508.

children.title: LNG
children.summary: With few actual fixtures reported this week, the LNG market has seen further corrections down. At the same time last year we had been publishing at $405,290 for BLNG1g a value $275,782 higher than that with which we published today.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: It has again been quite a tumultuous week for the LPG Market. On BLPG1 Ras Tanura-Chiba we saw initially a reasonable gain moving up around $11 by mid-week, but then as has been the fashion of late, it dropped off nearly $13 to close at $117.143 giving a daily TCE earning of $102,640.
